data.title: Trump Calls Fed Chair Jerome Powell a ‘Numbskull,’ Claims Lack of Rate Cuts Are Costing US $600,000,000,000 a Year
data.description:
US President Donald Trump has more insults for Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. At a bill signing ceremony on Thursday, Trump claimed the government would save $600 billion a year in short-term debt payments if Powell lowered the federal funds rate by 2 percentage points.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/13/trump-calls-fed-chair-jerome-powell-a-numbskull-claims-lack-of-rate-cuts-are-costing-us-600000000000-a-year/

data.title: Bitcoin Price Crash To $94,000 Imminent As Fibonacci Resistance Is At Stake
data.description:
Bitcoin’s recent price action has shown signs of fading momentum three weeks after reaching a new all-time high of $111,814. The leading cryptocurrency climbed back above $110,000 on Monday off the back of cooling U. S. inflation data and a temporarily weaker dollar
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-crash-to-94000-imminent/

data.title: Polkadot seeks stability with $2M Bitcoin reserve strategy amid DOT downturn
data.description:
A new proposal within the Polkadot ecosystem is pushing for the creation of a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. According to the proposal, the plan involves converting 500,000 DOT, valued at around $2 million, into Threshold Bitcoin (tBTC), a wrapped version of Bitcoin secured through threshold cryptography, which ensures decentralization and non-custodial management.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/polkadot-seeks-stability-with-2m-bitcoin-reserve-strategy-amid-dot-downturn/

data.title: Andrew Kang: Bitcoin is unlikely to see a 30% correction in the short term, and may fluctuate upward to $140,000-160,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Andrew Kang, partner of Mechanism Capital, said in an article that the current market environment is extremely favorable for Bitcoin, and Bitcoin is expected to continue to rise amid volatility. Before it reaches at least $140,000 to $160,000, the possibility of a deep correction of more than 30% is low. He also mentioned that the policies adopted by Trump during the trade war had become a key bottom signal for Bitcoin.

data.title: Bloomberg lists spot ETF decisions and their 2025 approval odds
data.description:
The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) will decide on crypto exchange-traded funds (spot ETFs) approvals in the second half of 2025. A Bloomberg snapshot shared by ETF analyst Eric Balchunas shows a list of digital asset funds filed and odds of approval, led by Grayscale, VanEck, Bitwise, and Canary Capital. The tokens include Solana […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bloomberg-spot-etf-2025-approval-odds/

data.title: SharpLink Acquires $463M in Ether, Shares Remain 66% Lower
data.description:
SharpLink Gaming (SBET), the public firm pivoting to a crypto treasury strategy focused on Ethereum, revealed on Friday it acquired 176,271 ether ETH for nearly $463 million.The purchase makes the firm the largest ETH holder among publicly traded companies, SharpLink said in a press release.The company tapped its $1 billion at-the-market (ATM) common stock share facility for $79 million to help fund the ETH acquisition.The ETH purchase announcement came on the heels of a Thursday regulatory filing that potentially enabled investors in the firm's private placement round to sell shares, sending stock prices down 70% after market hours
source: https://www.coindesk.com/business/2025/06/13/sharplink-acquires-463m-in-ether-shares-remain-66-lower
